direction.phrase: brand-faithful refresh â€” 5 variants A-E, canonical F selected
direction.approvedVariantNote: User-directed merge of best sections from A+B+C: header/hero/proof from A, ds-feature from C, quicklinks from A, group-teasers from A, whats-happening from B, footer from A. Bento promo-card grid replaces auto-fit grid. ds-feature uses absolute-positioned figure for true full-bleed.

history.note: Variant A (faithful + improvements), static. Gates: critique clean; audit AA-clean (P1 contrast fixed via --color-accent-ink); adapt analyzed at 1920/1440/1280/900/640/414/375/360; motion N/A (static).
Variant B (Care-routing first), static. IA bet: five equal-weight need-routing cards beside captured search field; news/events/blog demoted.
Variant C (Photography-led / 'The Warm Editorial Front Door'), static. Full-bleed editorial photography; ds-feature pattern established.
Variant D (Confident display / 'The Institution, Set in Type'), static. Perfect-fourth modular scale; visible 12-col grid.
Variant E (Calm / neutral-forward), static. Pill shape system; blue rationed to wayfinding only.

Variant F â€” user-directed merge A+B+C. Bento editorial grid (1.2fr 0.9fr 0.9fr, first card row-span 2). ds-feature: figure position:absolute inset:0 for true full-bleed. Editorial panel: border-top 3px solid --color-accent. Impeccable detector: 0 findings.
User approved variant F as canonical design for the migration.
